case_title: PEINADO, RENE E. vs. STOLPER, KIM et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEINADO, RENE E. SERVED JUN-01-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STOLPER, KIM
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT STOLPER, KIM COSTS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES TO BE DETERMINED.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEINADO, RENE E. AS TO DEFENDANT STOLPER, KIM DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT STOLPER, KIM HEARING SET FOR JUN-27-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
OPPOSITION DEFENDANT STOLPER'S DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEINADO, RENE E.
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT JUDGMENT OF JUL-28-1995 SET ASIDE
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF JUN-27-1995, SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND FATALLY DEFECTIVE NOTICE. CCP 430.10 (F).
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
